1.description: get Lillestrøm municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) within Lillestrøm municipality (to be filtered by step1 result)

3.description: get quick-clay hazard areas overlapping Lillestrøm

4.description: get 1 km grid cells overlapping Lillestrøm

5.description: select parcels that intersect quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: assign hazard parcels to 1 km grid cells

7.description: count parcels per grid cell and return top five

FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]

FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3205'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
